archetype: Archetype 4: Swiss & High-Contrast (Light Mode) with Athletic Twist

typography.notes: Use 'Barlow Condensed' for all major headings to evoke a sports/athletic feel. 'Manrope' for all body text, UI elements, and data tables for maximum legibility. Never use Inter.

spacing_and_layout.surface_strategy: Cards should have a flat solid background (bg-white), a 1px subtle border (border-slate-200), and NO shadow by default. On hover, add a slight lift (-translate-y-1) and a subtle shadow (shadow-lg).

buttons.primary: bg-orange-500 text-white hover:bg-orange-600 font-bold uppercase tracking-wider rounded-lg px-6 py-3 transition-transform hover:-translate-y-0.5
buttons.secondary: bg-slate-100 text-slate-900 hover:bg-slate-200 font-bold uppercase tracking-wider rounded-lg px-6 py-3 border border-slate-200
buttons.outline: border-2 border-slate-200 text-slate-700 hover:border-orange-500 hover:text-orange-500 font-bold uppercase tracking-wider rounded-lg px-6 py-3

components.inputs: bg-white border border-slate-300 rounded-lg focus:ring-2 focus:ring-orange-500 focus:border-orange-500 p-3 text-slate-900
components.cards: bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-lg p-6 hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-200
components.badges: px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wide
components.navigation: Sticky top header with glassmorphism (bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-slate-200). Must include visible links on desktop.

images.description: Group of young basketball players playing a game. Use for login page background or marketing hero section.
images.usage: overlay with bg-white/40 or bg-slate-900/60 depending on text contrast needs. Given light mode, if text is dark, use bg-white/60 over it.

images.description: Empty indoor basketball court. Use for dashboard welcome banners or strategy page headers.
images.usage: Use as a card background with a heavy white gradient overlay (from-white to-white/20) to keep text readable.
Use for section backgrounds where a plain white feels too empty, especially around the AI Message Composer or Communication Log.

iconography.style: duotone or regular weights. Maintain a precise, technical look to match the high-contrast aesthetic.

animations.page_load: Staggered fade-up for grid items. Use framer-motion with stiff spring animations to reflect athletic energy.

specific_page_guidelines.login_page: Split screen layout. Left side: Login form with minimalist inputs and sharp orange primary button. Right side: The 'hero_basketball_players' image covering the full height, no text over it.
specific_page_guidelines.dashboard: Bento 'Control Room' Grid (grid-cols-4). Use solid flat cards with 1px border. Top section should have an overarching 'Season Goals' or 'Recruitment Status' summary.
specific_page_guidelines.college_directory: Dense list or bento grid. Use badges for 'Division I/II/III' and 'Foreign-Friendly'. Provide strong visual hierarchy for college names vs locations.
specific_page_guidelines.ai_message_composer: Clean, distraction-free writing interface. The AI suggestions panel should be distinct (maybe with a subtle orange or blue tint background) to separate it from the user's draft area.
specific_page_guidelines.communication_log: Table layout with clear status badges (Sent, Replied, Draft). Left-align all textual data.
specific_page_guidelines.strategy_follow_up: Use timeline views or step-by-step vertical layouts. Highlight AI actionable insights with the accent color (orange).

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure text over any image has sufficient contrast or uses backdrop blur/overlay.
accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All interactive elements MUST have 'data-testid' attributes (e.g., data-testid='login-submit-button', data-testid='college-filter-select').
